aboutPage: I am a UI Developer with a background in Multimedia/Interactive Design. I have experience with NodeJS (creating APIs, small Express apps, proof-of-concepts, prototypes etc.).
I enjoy discussing JavaScript, frameworks and libraries in forums and had the good fortune of hosting JavaScript meetups with TechSith Tutorials.
